summary.headline: Fixed VetkaTree indexing gap - dual Qdrant clients now synchronized
key_achievements: FIX_101.2: MCP format_result now checks 'files' key (was 'results')
FIX_101.3: Added VetkaTree write in TripleWriteManager
FIX_101.4: Added parent_folder and depth to qdrant_updater
FIX_101.5: Fixed TreeStructureTool type check ('leaf' not 'file')
FIX_101.6: vetka_get_tree counts both 'leaf' and 'file' types
FIX_101.7: All type checks now accept both 'leaf' and 'file' interchangeably
pending_items: Unify metadata creation to shared function

recent_fixes.description: Accept both 'leaf' and 'file' types interchangeably in all type checks
Added VetkaTree write for hierarchical storage

architecture.triple_write: Weaviate VetkaLeaf + Qdrant vetka_elisya + Qdrant VetkaTree

agent_instructions.on_connect: Read this digest for current project state before starting work
agent_instructions.on_search_issues: Check if VetkaTree has points, verify HNSW index active
agent_instructions.on_file_indexing: Ensure both vetka_elisya AND VetkaTree receive writes
agent_instructions.methodology: Use Haiku scouts for investigation, Sonnets for verification
